name: Scary Joker Game
description: Scary Joker Game is a thrilling horror adventure that puts you face-to-face with a terrifying joker in a dark and mysterious environment. Your mission is to explore creepy locations, solve challenging puzzles, and find a way to escape before the joker catches you.
instructions: W A S D ndash Move the character E ndash Interact open doors pick up items drop items C ndash Toggle crouch press once to crouch press again to stand
